content: PWA install: Android/Windows/macOS/Linux support beforeinstallprompt event for custom install prompts. iOS Safari does NOT support beforeinstallprompt — install is manual via Share > Add to Home Screen. Chrome/Edge on iOS also don't support PWA install. For iOS: show in-app guided instructions pointing to Safari Share button. Detect iOS via userAgent or navigator.userAgentData. vite-plugin-pwa handles service worker registration automatically.
